# PergoClean

> PergoClean is a specialized technical maintenance and restoration company focused on pergola systems, bioclimatic roofs, rolling roof systems, ZIP curtains, shutters, solar panels, and mechanical outdoor automation systems.

## Main Services

- **Pergola Fabric Cleaning**: Technical cleaning for PVC-coated and acrylic pergola fabrics using low-pressure and coating-safe methods. Specializing in blackout restoration.
- **Bioclimatic Roof Maintenance**: Preventive maintenance for aluminum louver systems, drainage channels, and motorized mechanisms (Somfy, Becker, etc.).
- **ZIP Curtain Cleaning**: Rail cleaning, tension control, fabric-safe washing, and mechanism inspection.
- **Solar Panel Cleaning**: Pure-water and residue-free cleaning methods for photovoltaic efficiency optimization.
- **Mechanical System Maintenance**: Inspection and lubrication for outdoor motorized systems and automation components.
- **Outdoor Aluminum Surface Restoration**: Oxidation removal and protective coating applications.

## Technical Entities & Expertise

- Material Science: PVC coated polyester, Acrylic awning fabric, PTFE membrane.
- Failure Analysis: UV degradation, Rail oxidation, Drainage blockage, EPDM gasket failure.
- Systems: Bioclimatic louvers, ZIP screen mechanisms, Tubular motor systems.
- Standards: European norms for outdoor shading systems maintenance.
